prompt: Generate a detailed image of a futuristic space station common room. Use the provided reference image explicitly as a depth map to guide the layout and spatial arrangement of furniture and architectural elements.
prompt_refined: Generate a detailed image of a futuristic space station common room. The scene should include a seating area on the far left with a sofa and a small round table, where a single person is depicted using a laptop. Towards the center-right, a prominent counter or bar area is present, with three figures seated on bar stools. The ceiling features linear lighting fixtures and suspended circular elements. Explicitly use image 1 as a depth map to guide the precise layout and spatial arrangement of all furniture, architectural components, and figures within the room.
objects: Seating area on the far left
Small round table on the far left
Prominent counter or bar area towards the center-right
Three figures seated on bar stools
Linear lighting fixtures on the ceiling
Suspended circular elements on the ceiling
